hooks.command: COMMAND=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); case "$COMMAND" in git\ commit*) FOUND=$(grep -rl --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx' --include='*.js' 'PGPASSWORD\|client_secret\|privateKey\|sk-live\|AIzaSy' src/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo "Hardcoded secrets detected in: $FOUND"; exit 2; fi ;; esac
